title: ShapeLinearGradient
description: A linear background gradient for a shape wireframe. Colors before the first stop and after the last stop are clamped to the nearest stop color.

stops.description: Ordered gradient color stops. Positions must be non-decreasing.

startPoint.description: The point where position 0 of the gradient is placed.

endPoint.description: The point where position 1 of the gradient is placed.
